description_long: This playground structure is a two-level wooden playhouse with a pitched roof and a small window on the upper level. The upper platform is accessed by a set of stairs and features a safety railing, while a bright green slide descends from one side. The lower level is open and partially enclosed, providing space for additional play equipment such as a yellow ride-on toy and a blue sandbox. The structure is supported by sturdy wooden beams and posts, and the overall design is reminiscent of a miniature house. The materials and construction suggest durability and suitability for outdoor use in parks or residential areas.
description: A two-level wooden playhouse with a pitched roof, green slide, stairs, and open lower play area with additional toys.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stairs, main entrance, upper platform with railing, and the green slide extending to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pitched roof, enclosed upper level, and visible yellow ride-on toy in the lower area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the window, side safety railing, and the full length of the green slide.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with the slide facing forward, stairs to the left, and partial view of the lower play area.
